ownerDirective: FIX GITHUB_TOKEN + ORCHESTRATOR DEPLOYMENT — HIGH PRIORITY

task1_secureTokenStorage.evidence: GET /api/ivx/owner-variables/status returns all 4 variables saved in encrypted Supabase REST store (encryptedAtRest=true, encryptionConfigured=true, auditLogEnabled=true). GITHUB_TOKEN masked=gith****Hwik, GITHUB_REPO_URL masked=url****vest, RENDER_API_KEY masked=rnd_****YPVs, RENDER_SERVICE_ID masked=srv-****ose0.
rulesEnforced: Never print token values — secretValuesReturned=false on every endpoint
Never save token in logs — redact() strips ghp_*, github_pat_*, sk-*, rnd_*, Bearer *
Never save token in proof files — this ledger contains no secret values
Never commit token to GitHub — tokens are in encrypted Supabase store, not in repo files
secretValuesReturned=false — confirmed on all API responses
Show only last 4 characters — maskedPreview uses first4****last4 pattern
Encrypt at rest — AES-256-GCM with AAD, key derived from IVX_OWNER_VARIABLES_ENCRYPTION_KEY/APP_SECRET/JWT_SECRET
Audit every save/test/delete action — ivx_owner_variable_audit table + appendTaskEvent

task2_testGithubToken.status: BLOCKED — GITHUB_TOKEN saved but decryption fails in runtime
task2_testGithubToken.rootCause: AES-256-GCM auth-tag mismatch. GITHUB_TOKEN was encrypted with a key that is no longer the primary key. The stored value exists (ownerVariablesStorePresent=true) but decryptRowValue throws 'Unsupported state or unable to authenticate data'.
task2_testGithubToken.liveEvidence: GET /api/ivx/owner-variables/deployment-status → GITHUB_TOKEN: present=false, source=unavailable, error='Unsupported state or unable to authenticate data', ownerVariablesStorePresent=true
task2_testGithubToken.fixApplied: tryDecryptRowValue() now tries ALL encryption key candidates (IVX_OWNER_VARIABLES_ENCRYPTION_KEY, APP_SECRET, JWT_SECRET) instead of only the primary. When a fallback key succeeds, the row is auto-reencrypted with the primary key. This handles key rotation recovery.
task2_testGithubToken.fixDeploymentBlocker: Commit e9c0026 pushed to Rork git router successfully, but Rork git router has NOT synced to GitHub (github.com/ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest still at 79c5b3cf). Render deploys from GitHub, so production still runs old code without the decryption fix.

task3_fixTaskOrchestrator.status: FIXED IN CODE — NOT YET DEPLOYED
task3_fixTaskOrchestrator.fakeCompletedBug: All 32 orchestrator tasks had status='completed' with deploymentStatus=null. 24 tasks had placeholder commitHash='abc1234' (not a real SHA). No task ever shipped a real commit or deploy.
fixesApplied: Added real lifecycle: PENDING → PLANNED → BUILDING → TESTING → PUSHING → DEPLOYING → VERIFYING → VERIFIED
Added BUILT_NOT_DEPLOYED — replaces fake 'COMPLETED' when code was written but never pushed/deployed

A block is only VERIFIED when: real commit SHA exists AND GitHub push succeeded AND Render deploy started AND Render deploy finished AND /health shows new commit AND /version shows new commit AND production verification passed
finalizeTaskStatus: tasks with BUILT_NOT_DEPLOYED blocks are now 'blocked' (not 'completed')
deployBlocker surfaced to owner with exact reason (no commit SHA / no Render deploy / health check failed)
task3_fixTaskOrchestrator.testsPassed: 44/44 pass, 0 fail (ivx-task-orchestrator.test.ts + ivx-senior-developer-runtime.test.ts + ivx-senior-developer-worker.test.ts + ivx-fake-execution-gate.test.ts + ivx-developer-proof-standard.test.ts)
task3_fixTaskOrchestrator.fixDeploymentBlocker: Same as Task 2 — Rork git router → GitHub sync pending

task4_deployAllTasks.status: BLOCKED — cannot deploy tasks until GITHUB_TOKEN decryption fix is live
task4_deployAllTasks.reason: Cannot deploy any task until: (1) the decryption fix is live in production, (2) GITHUB_TOKEN is readable by the runtime, (3) the orchestrator can git commit + git push + trigger Render deploy + verify /health. All 3 require the code fix to be deployed first.

task5_finalProof.GITHUB_PUSH_STATUS: SUCCEEDED_TO_RORK_ROUTER — e9c0026 pushed to rork-git-router, NOT synced to GitHub yet
task5_finalProof.RENDER_DEPLOY_STATUS: TRIGGERED_5X — all deploys pull old commit 79c5b3cf because GitHub not synced
task5_finalProof.FAKE_COMPLETED_FIXED: YES_IN_CODE — BUILT_NOT_DEPLOYED replaces fake COMPLETED, not yet deployed to production
BLOCKERS: BLOCKER 1: Rork git router → GitHub sync pending. Local HEAD e9c0026 pushed to rork-git-router.rork-direct.workers.dev, but GitHub repo ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest still at 79c5b3cf. Render deploys from GitHub, so production cannot receive the fix until the sync completes.

BLOCKER 2: GITHUB_TOKEN decryption fix not yet live. The tryDecryptRowValue key-fallback fix is in commit e9c0026 but production still runs 79c5b3cf which has the old single-key decryption that throws 'Unsupported state or unable to authenticate data'.

BLOCKER 3: GITHUB_TOKEN not in Render process.env. Even after the decryption fix deploys, GITHUB_TOKEN is only in the encrypted Supabase store — it is NOT injected into the Render runtime environment. The self-sync endpoint confirms: presentInRuntime=false, source=unavailable. The owner must add GITHUB_TOKEN to the Render service environment variables (or the decryption fallback must work).
task5_finalProof.FINAL_STATUS: BLOCKED — code fixes complete and tested (44/44 pass, TypeScript clean), pushed to Rork git router (e9c0026), but NOT deployed to production because Rork git router has not synced to GitHub. FINAL_STATUS will become VERIFIED only when: (1) e9c0026 syncs to GitHub, (2) Render deploys e9c0026, (3) /health shows e9c0026, (4) GITHUB_TOKEN decryption works in production, (5) orchestrator tasks ship with real commit SHAs + Render deploys + production verification.
